requirement_topic.en: OCPP Interoperability and IEC 61000 EMC Requirements

summary.en: Israel's EV charging network operates within an IEC-aligned regulatory framework. Networked public chargers use OCPP (Open Charge Point Protocol) — version 1.6 or 2.0.1 — for back-office communication, consistent with European practice. OCPP compliance is required by charge-point operators and project owners as a condition of site activation and network integration for public charging installations. EMC requirements for EV supply equipment in Israel follow IEC 61000 series standards as adopted by SII. IEC 61851-21-2 covers EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment specifically. Exporters must provide IEC 61000 series EMC test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; China domestic EMC reports to GB/T standards are not accepted as IEC 61000 equivalents without a gap assessment.
summary.zh: 以色列电动汽车充电网络在IEC体系法规框架内运营。联网公共充电桩使用OCPP（开放充电点协议）——1.6版或2.0.1版——进行后台通信，与欧洲惯例一致。充电点运营商和项目业主要求OCPP合规性作为公共充电安装站点激活和网络集成的条件。以色列EVSE的EMC要求遵循SII采用的IEC 61000系列标准。IEC 61851-21-2专门涵盖非车载EVSE的EMC要求。出口商须提供ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC测试证据；未经差距评估的中国国内GB/T标准EMC报告不被视为IEC 61000等同证据。
summary.zht: 以色列電動汽車充電網絡在IEC體系法規框架內運營。聯網公共充電樁使用OCPP（開放充電點協議）——1.6版或2.0.1版——進行後台通訊，與歐洲慣例一致。充電點運營商和項目業主要求OCPP合規性作為公共充電安裝站點激活和網絡集成的條件。以色列EVSE的EMC要求遵循SII採用的IEC 61000系列標準。IEC 61851-21-2專門涵蓋非車載EVSE的EMC要求。出口商須提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000系列EMC測試證據；未經差距評估的中國國內GB/T標準EMC報告不被視為IEC 61000等同證據。

standards_or_laws: OCPP 1.6 / OCPP 2.0.1 — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV charging back-office communication
IEC 61851-21-2 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 21-2: EMC requirements for off-board EV supply equipment
IEC 63584 — Standard for OCPP adoption in EV charging (international context)
SI/IEC 61000 as adopted by SII (Standards Institution of Israel)

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use the GB/T 27930-2023 communication protocol between the off-board charger and the battery management system, which is a CAN bus protocol and is not interoperable with OCPP back-office systems or the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. China AC chargers may implement OCPP-based back-office protocols depending on the operator, but the underlying connector and signaling stack still uses CC/CP rather than the PP/CP signaling required for IEC 62196 Type 2 and OCPP-integrated systems. China domestic EMC testing is conducted to GB/T standards derived from CISPR and IEC 61000, but the test reports are issued against GB/T references, not IEC 61000 directly, and may not be accepted by SII or Israel project owners without supplementary review.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023通信协议（非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的CAN总线协议），该协议与OCPP后台系统或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。中国交流充电桩根据运营商情况可能采用基于OCPP的后台协议，但底层接口和信号栈仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2及OCPP集成系统所要求的PP/CP信号。中国国内EMC测试按照源自CISPR和IEC 61000的GB/T标准进行，但测试报告依据GB/T参考标准出具，而非直接依据IEC 61000，未经补充审查可能不被SII或以色列项目业主接受。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023通訊協議（非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的CAN總線協議），該協議與OCPP後台系統或CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。中國交流充電樁根據運營商情況可能採用基於OCPP的後台協議，但底層接口和信號棧仍使用CC/CP，而非IEC 62196 Type 2及OCPP集成系統所要求的PP/CP信號。中國國內EMC測試按照源自CISPR和IEC 61000的GB/T標準進行，但測試報告依據GB/T參考標準出具，而非直接依據IEC 61000，未經補充審查可能不被SII或以色列項目業主接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system
China GB/T EMC standards (derived from CISPR / IEC 61000 but issued as GB/T references)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger firmware supports OCPP 1.6 or 2.0.1 as required by the Israel charge-point operator or project specification; (2) back-office API integration and site testing are completed before network activation; (3) GB/T 27930 DC communication is replaced with the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 stack for CCS2 DC stations; (4) IEC 61000 series EMC evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is obtained for the specific product; (5) IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence is included for off-board EVSE. GB/T EMC reports alone are not IEC 61000 equivalents and should be supplemented with IEC-reference test reports.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩固件支持以色列充电点运营商或项目规范所要求的OCPP 1.6或2.0.1版本；(2) 在网络激活前完成后台API集成和现场测试；(3) CCS2直流充电站将GB/T 27930直流通信替换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈；(4) 从ILAC认可实验室获取具体产品的IEC 61000系列EMC证据；(5) 非车载EVSE须包含IEC 61851-21-2 EMC证据。单独的GB/T EMC报告不等同于IEC 61000证据，应以IEC参考标准测试报告予以补充。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁固件支持以色列充電點運營商或項目規範所要求的OCPP 1.6或2.0.1版本；(2) 在網絡激活前完成後台API集成和現場測試；(3) CCS2直流充電站將GB/T 27930直流通訊替換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧；(4) 從ILAC認可實驗室獲取具體產品的IEC 61000系列EMC證據；(5) 非車載EVSE須包含IEC 61851-21-2 EMC證據。單獨的GB/T EMC報告不等同於IEC 61000證據，應以IEC參考標準測試報告予以補充。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — OCPP 1.6 / 2.0.1 required for networked public chargers; IEC 61000 series EMC compliance required under SII mandatory SI standards; IEC 61851-21-2 EMC evidence required for off-board EVSE
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is mandatory for China domestic DC charging communication; it is not OCPP-compatible. GB/T EMC reports are not IEC 61000 direct equivalents for Israel market purposes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] OCPP back-office integration is a network-activation requirement for public chargers in Israel. IEC 61000 EMC evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory is required under SII mandatory SI standards — GB/T EMC reports are not a direct substitute. Chargers with only GB/T 27930 DC communication cannot be activated on Israel's public charging network without firmware and communication-stack redesign.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] OCPP后台集成是以色列公共充电桩网络激活的必要条件。SII强制SI标准要求提供ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC 61000 EMC证据——GB/T EMC报告不是直接替代。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩在不进行固件和通信栈重新设计的情况下，无法在以色列公共充电网络上激活。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] OCPP後台集成是以色列公共充電樁網絡激活的必要條件。SII強制SI標準要求提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC 61000 EMC證據——GB/T EMC報告不是直接替代。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁在不進行固件和通訊棧重新設計的情況下，無法在以色列公共充電網絡上激活。
